shared_properties: Project core palette keeps primary #3BBEAC, background #1E1E2E, and accent #FFD700.
Canvas target stays 1920x1080px with pixel-perfect nearest-neighbor presentation at 60 FPS.
Rendering stays 2D pixel art with flat shading and a 1px dark moss outline.
The tile repeats cleanly across the full background field.
differences: Eight frames cycle soft mud bubbles and moss shimmer.
Highlight pockets keep the board readable over the backdrop.
The loop stays calm at 10 FPS and never dominates the play area.

context.usage: Repeating farm backdrop tile behind the full board and side panels.

specs.texture: Mud ripples, moss flecks, and shallow bubble pockets.
specs.shading: Flat fill with one bright rim and one dark recessed band.

acceptance_criteria: Sprite sheet size is exactly 512x64px with 8 columns and 1 row.
Opposite tile edges match on every frame so repetition stays seamless.
The brightest highlight cluster stays under 12 contiguous pixels.

reference_images.label: bubble_farm_moodboard
reference_images.purpose: Grounds the pastel mud farm palette and warm pixel-art tone.

reference_images.label: bubble_farm_gameplay_balance
reference_images.purpose: Grounds the 9x7 board, balance axis, route overlay, and HUD placement.

bevy_constraints.bundle_strategy: SpriteSheetBundle with a shared loop timer.
bevy_constraints.asset_loading: Load world/world_background_mud_loop_64x64_8f.png during the Loading state and tile it through a background spawner resource.
runtime_notes: Align every tile to a 64px grid.
Reuse one atlas timer across the loop set.
Keep the backdrop beneath every gameplay and UI layer.
